- once the website finished, remove the devtools and tool bar
- in the user profile, when changing email send a real confirmation email
    - a confirmation email should also be send when the admin change the email of a user
    - same thing with the passwords
    - also restrict the actions an admin can do toward another admin account

- nearly all the data are sensitive data. as such most of them will need to be crypted


- the admins needs to be able to get the logs.
